title: Add M3 mood thoughts and memories
summary: Add fact-driven mood, bounded thoughts and memory lanes for ordinary-life consequences.
acceptance: Mood target/current state derives from structured facts including needs environment and health conditions
Thought and memory lanes are bounded deterministic serializable data with explicit source strength duration stack and target fields
Mood updates use scheduled stable ordering and integer/fixed-point semantics
Explanations read shared structured reason data rather than UI-only text templates
Focused tests cover deterministic thought generation mood convergence bounded capacity expiration and replay-stable hashes

history.details: Created by WM-0045 M3 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

objective: Implement fact-driven mood and thought state without random mental-event pools or UI-owned explanations.
forbiddenPaths: relationship graph implementation beyond event hooks
M4 anomaly possession crisis or Chronicle evidence systems
benchmarkImpact: Records thought generation counts retained capacity mood update cost and reason trace counts; baseline updates wait for WM-0059.
reviewRouting: Simulation-engineer completes to reviewer; gameplay-designer may inspect content semantics but cannot replace structured state with text-only events.
rollbackModel: Revert mood/thought/memory code tests docs and report while preserving needs environment and health stores.
ownerGate: Avoid real-world mental illness labels as negative traits
Bound memory/thought storage and trace materialization
Block on save protocol schema dependency UI authority or M4 scope

sparkEligibility.reason: Mood/thought state ownership and deterministic explainability are outside Spark scope.
